ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
Language: jupyter-notebook
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini on Vertex AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InternRobotics/InternNav
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InternRobotics/InternNav
Language: jupyter-notebook
InternRobotics' open platform for building generalized navigation foundation models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lifelong-Robot-Learning/LIBERO
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lifelong-Robot-Learning/LIBERO
Language: jupyter-notebook
Benchmarking Knowledge Transfer in Lifelong Robot Learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-omni is a natively end-to-end, omni-modal LLM developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, images, and video, as well as generating speech in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts
Language: jupyter-notebook
Follow along with our tutorials to get you up and running with Snowflake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: borglab/gtsam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/borglab/gtsam
Language: jupyter-notebook
GTSAM is a library of C++ classes that implement smoothing and mapping (SAM) in robotics and vision, using factor graphs and Bayes networks as the underlying computing paradigm rather than sparse matrices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始的大语言模型原理与实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/llm-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/llm-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
面向开发者的 LLM 入门教程，吴恩达大模型系列课程中文版

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/audiocraft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft
Language: jupyter-notebook
Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov2
Language: jupyter-notebook
PyTorch code and models for the DINOv2 self-supervised learning method.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the Gemini API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/gemma-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemma-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of guides and examples for the Gemma open models from Google.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-samples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Samples and data for Microsoft Fabric Learn content

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
250+ Fine-tuning & RL Notebooks for text, vision, audio, embedding, TTS models.
